name: Irish Spiced Beef
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: prepare 7 days in advance of eating!
1. Wipe meat over with a damp cloth.
2. Mix seasoning ingredients together except for carrots, onions, and fresh herbs.
3. Rub the seasoning well into the meat; then lay the meat on a bed of seasoning.
4. Leave in a cool place (preferably not refrigerated), though.
5. Repeat rubbing each day.
6. On the seventh day, put the meat into a saucepan and cover with cold water.
7. Bring to boiling point and simmer gently for 5 hours until tender.
8. Put cooked meat on a flat dish and cover with a board.
9. Set weight on top of the board until the meat is cold; then it is ready to carve and eat.
